description: A team of scientists is collaborating on the analysis of a large dataset and needs to share results and interpretations.

nodes.task_description: Upload a large dataset to a shared, secure research platform.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads the dataset to the collaborative workspace.

nodes.task_description: One scientist performs an analysis and shares the resulting plots and code with the team within the platform.

expected_outcome.value: Agent shares the analysis, and team members are notified.

nodes.task_description: Another scientist adds comments and annotations to the shared plots.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds comments, suggesting an alternative way to visualize the data.

nodes.task_description: The team jointly drafts a summary of the findings within the platform's collaborative document editor.

expected_outcome.value: The team works together in real-time to produce a consensus summary of the results.
